code: import React from'react';import{motion,AnimatePresence}from'framer-motion';import{CheckCircle2,AlertCircle,XCircle,Info,X}from'lucide-react';import{useApp}from'../context/AppContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Toast=()=>{const{notifications,setNotifications}=useApp();const getIcon=type=>{switch(type){case'success':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CheckCircle2,{size:20,className:"toast-icon-success"});case'error':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(XCircle,{size:20,className:"toast-icon-error"});case'warning':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AlertCircle,{size:20,className:"toast-icon-warning"});default:return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Info,{size:20,className:"toast-icon-info"});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AnimatePresence,{children:notifications.map(notification=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(motion.div,{layout:true,initial:{opacity:0,x:50,scale:0.3},animate:{opacity:1,x:0,scale:1},exit:{opacity:0,scale:0.5,transition:{duration:0.2}},className:`toast-item toast-${notification.type}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast-icon-wrap",children:getIcon(notification.type)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast-content",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"toast-message",children:notification.message})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"toast-close",onClick:()=>setNotifications(prev=>prev.filter(n=>n.id!==notification.id)),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(X,{size:16})})]},notification.id))})});};export default Toast;
